troubleshooting.title: Execution Fails with Handler Error
troubleshooting.shortdesc: Diagnose handler-level execution failures by mapping report failures back to plan intent and handler implementation.

troublebody.p: Problem: One or more actions fail during execution and the report includes status: "failed".
Cause: Common causes include missing handler parameters, path traversal rejection, source file absence, or plugin handler logic defects.

ul.li: Filter failed entries: jq '.results[] | select(.status=="failed") | {action_id, handler, error_type, error, message}' build/execution-report.json.
Trace each action_id in plan.json to inspect intended parameters.
Run the same plan in dry-run mode to isolate dispatch from filesystem writes.
Fix handler validation logic or action emission parameters, then rerun.
